features.name: Image Preprocessing
features.description: CLAHE low-light enhancement + basic resize applied before detection.

features.name: Helmet Violation Detection
features.description: Fine-tuned YOLOv8m detects WithHelmet/WithoutHelmet/TripleRiding/Plate on the master dataset. Model currently training on Kaggle — drop best.pt at models/weights/traffic_violations/best.pt when done.

tests.notes: Detector mapping tests added in test_detector.py but require model weights to run full integration.

features.notes: No fallback model used — detector returns empty results until trained weights are placed. Code handles the 4-class master dataset labels correctly.

features.name: Triple Riding Detection
features.description: YOLOv8-Pose occupant counting within padded vehicle bbox.

tests.notes: Unit test would require pose model + image; integration tested via pipeline mock.

features.name: License Plate Recognition
features.description: Plate detection + PaddleOCR PP-OCRv4 + KA-format validation/correction.

tests.notes: 4 unit tests covering formatting, valid plates, OCR confusion correction, out-of-state rejection.

subtasks.name: Measure character accuracy on DataCluster sample

features.notes: KA RegEx and 8x character heuristic swaps implemented.

features.name: Evidence Packaging
features.description: Annotated image + JSON metadata + SHA-256 hash, with legal section mapping.

tests.notes: Tests added: hash generation, severity mapping, annotation, legal section mapping.

features.notes: Dataclass mapped directly to JSONL spec.

features.name: Backend REST API
features.description: FastAPI service exposing violations, analytics, and evidence endpoints for consumption by the (separately built) React dashboard.

tests.notes: Health, violations list, analytics summary tested. New endpoints need test coverage.

features.notes: 3/8 endpoints complete. All 5 remaining endpoints implemented in this session.

features.name: Evaluation Script
features.description: Precision/recall/F1 on the test set for the detector, plus LPR character/plate-level accuracy, written to outputs/metrics.json.

tests.notes: Fixed data.yaml path to master_traffic_violation_dataset. Test updated to match new no-fallback behavior.

features.notes: No fallback model. Metrics only generated when trained best.pt is present. Requires dataset YAML at the correct path.

features.name: Sample Annotated Outputs (50+)
features.description: Run the end-to-end pipeline on 50+ images to generate annotated evidence images and corresponding JSONL records.
features.notes: Pipeline orchestration implemented. violations.jsonl populated once trained model is placed.

features.name: Optional LLM-Assisted Violations
features.description: Groq vision LLM (llava-1.5-7b-4096) checks for mobile_phone, wrong_side_driving, red_light, seatbelt.
